title: Path Shape FAIL: falsifier with mislabeled shape class and wrong step triple
_primary_source_note: Intentional falsifier for validator testing (not a new claim), same generators as the PASS fixtures: Pythagorean tree moves (Barning, 1963) and (Hall, 1970).
_fixture_purpose: Falsifier: declares a UNIFORM_B path (moves all M_B) as shape_class MIXED (should trip PS_CLASS), and a step with a wrong F value (should trip PS_2's triple check).

paths.note: correct, kept valid so this fixture isolates the defects to path[1]
FALSIFIER: moves are all M_B so shape_class should be UNIFORM_B, declared MIXED; step[0].F should be 21 (5^2-2^2=25-4=21), declared 999

validation_checks.description: FALSIFIER: path[1] step[0] F=999 should be 21
FALSIFIER: path[1] declared MIXED but moves are all M_B

fail_ledger: PS_CLASS: path[1] declared MIXED but moves give UNIFORM_B
PS_2: path[1] step[0] triple mismatch: expected F=21 C=20 G=29, declared F=999
